name: MCDParamIsValid
title: MCDParamIsValid
syntax: long MCDParamIsValid ( char moduleName[], char paramName[])
description: Checks, if a parameter is valid. The value has to be from the MCD communication.

parameters.name: moduleName
parameters.description: Name of the module that is configured in the global options dialog External Programs|MCD 3D Server.

return: 1: Valid in the meaning of the functional description
